creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ulrich Spörlein from comment #8)

Yes, it should be possible to use GitHub actions to reach the same goal, but while for labels I easily found a very popular community action, in this case it seems there are only few small community actions already available. This is probably because CODEOWNERS is the standard tool.

I need to study if I prefer to use some already existent community action or if I prefer to create something new instead.

For now, I think we can close this bug report. Thank you very much Ulrich for all your help.
